name: chartjs-chart-sankey

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-written SVG when you need to quickly render {from,to,flow} flow edges as a Sankey for budget flows, conversion paths, or resource allocation, because native implementations fail at node layering, link widths, and low-crossing layout.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot produce Sankey node hierarchy, flow-conserving link widths, and low-crossing layout by default, and mermaid/Markdown has no equivalent notation; this plugin reduces the input to the three fields from/to/flow.

data_in.note: data_in.config goes directly into Chart.js; type must be sankey, and every dataset.data item must be a directed weighted edge with exactly from/to/flow.

options?._default: {}; boot additionally injects responsive:true and maintainAspectRatio:false
options?.plugins?: native Chart.js plugins configuration object -- uses upstream defaults by default

spec.note: The plugin lays out inside a canvas, so the parent container must have an explicit pixel height. boot defaults to 400px and disables aspect-ratio locking; rule 3 prohibits vh/percentage height.

when_to_use: 需要把 {from,to,flow} 流量边快速渲成预算流向、转化路径或资源分配 Sankey 时用它而非手写 SVG,因为原生手写在节点分层、链宽和交叉压缩布局上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到 Sankey 的节点层级、守恒链宽与低交叉布局,mermaid/Markdown 也没有等价表达;该插件把输入压到 from/to/flow 三字段。

data_in.note: data_in.config 直接进入 Chart.js;type 必须为 sankey,每个 dataset.data 元素严格是 from/to/flow 有向加权边。

options?._default: {};boot 另注入 responsive:true 与 maintainAspectRatio:false
options?.plugins?: Chart.js 原生 plugins 配置对象 —— 默认使用上游默认值

spec.note: 插件在 canvas 内布局,父容器必须有显式像素高度;boot 默认 400px并关闭纵横比锁定,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。

example._why: Chart.js 插件需同时满足控制器注册、type 与 datasets 三处约束,附最小原生 config。

peer.note: 运行时 peer 是 Chart.js >=3.3.0;boot 固定使用 catalog 的 Chart.js 4 主版本并显式注册全部基础部件。

carriers.widget: supported:canvas 与 tooltip 全落 shadow 容器,无外部 CSS
carriers.codex: supported:两个 ESM CDN 入口 + canvas,无上行依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm exports `O as Flow, L as SankeyController` (named) — boot import {SankeyController, Flow} + Chart.register(...registerables, SankeyController, Flow) matches README lines 39/41. README data elements are {from,to,flow} (lines 96-99); schema colorFrom/colorTo default red/green and colorMode 'gradient' match +esm O.defaults exactly. Inherits chart.js canvas rendering; grep for head/body/style injection = ZERO hits.
